validation.nameTooLong: Name cannot be longer than 20 characters.

microphone.title: Microphone Permission
microphone.message: We need access to your microphone for voice input.

update.title: Fresh Update Dropped!
update.message: We've been busy making Blotz even better just for you. Grab the latest version to keep the good vibes going!

forced.title: Update Required
forced.message: This version is no longer supported.Please update to continue using Blotz.

crash.title: Something went wrong
crash.message: Sorry about that! The app ran into an unexpected issue. Reloading usually fixes it.

errors.aiQuotaExceeded: You've used all AI for this period.
errors.server: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.
errors.validation: That didn't work. Please check your input.
errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.pushTokenFailed: Push notifications are not available on this device.
errors.physicalDeviceRequired: Push notifications require a physical device.
